data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be conclusively validated due to a failure in the LLM evaluation process.
data.assessment: The exploratory step 'Validate persona scenario #4' is dependent on the successful execution of prior evaluations, specifically the LLM evaluation calls. However, all linked use cases for validation have been blocked due to an evaluator error, which prevents any conclusive scoring or validation of the scenario. This lack of evaluative data leads to an inconclusive status for the current exploratory step.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic check
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Implement explicit endpoint + assertion contract for this exploratory requirement.
